mapper.select: SELECT t1.id AS taskId, t1.dept_id AS deptId, t1.required_completion_time as taskFlowDate, t2.name AS deptName FROM test_task as t1 LEFT JOIN test_team as t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_entrusted_task_rel ( id, department, task_flow_date, type, remark, user_id, address_name, task_id, entrust_id) values
( #{entity.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.taskFlowDate}, #{entity.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: SELECT id, department, task_flow_date, type, remark, user_id, address_name, task_id FROM test_entrusted_task_rel WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update:
update test_entrusted_task_rel
department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_flow_date = #{taskFlowDate},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address_name = #{addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrust_id = #{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_date = #{createDate},
update_date = #{updateDate},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_entrusted_task_rel
id,
department,
task_flow_date ,
type,
remark,
user_id,
address_name,
task_id,
entrust_id,
create_date,
update_date,
id,
#{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskFlowDate},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createDate},
#{updateDate},
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.task_flow_date, t1.type, t1.remark, t1.task_id, t2.task_code FROM test_entrusted_task_rel as t1 LEFT JOIN test_task as t2 ON t1.task_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrust_id = #{entrustId}

update.foreach:
update test_entrusted_task_rel
state = #{item.state},
department = #{item.department,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_flow_date = #{item.taskFlowDate},
type = #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address_name = #{item.addressName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrust_id = #{item.entrustId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_date = #{item.createDate},
update_date = #{item.updateDate},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
